title: API Rate Limit Exceeded
symptom: Collections are turning red and displaying error code 429 intermittently. Toggling or testing them temporarily resolves the issue.
not_this_if: On a paid plan with no rate limits
root_cause: The error 429 indicates that the application is making too many requests to the Xano API within a given timeframe, exceeding the allowed rate limit for the free plan.
fix_steps: Check your API usage and request frequency
Consider upgrading to a paid plan with higher rate limits
Optimize your API calls to reduce frequency
agent_instruction: Review your API usage and consider upgrading your plan to avoid rate limits.
